raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section anchors on a specific contribution claim (reference-free LLM judge beats hand-coded predicates); assessing whether the thesis, gap statement, and contribution framing are coherent and well-scoped is central to any substantive section review.","R1.2":"The argument chain—predicates are brittle → GPT-4o wrapper eliminates per-task engineering → ρ results confirm superiority → advocate replacing predicates—must be checked for logical gaps, hidden assumptions, and premise-conclusion validity.","R1.3":"Concrete figures (ρ = 0.78 vs 0.69 vs 0.55; 0.81 vs 0.62 on compositional families; 1,820 rollouts across 14 families) must be traceable to the described evaluation protocol; misalignment here directly invalidates the empirical core of the section.","R1.4":"Using an LLM as a zero-shot reference-free judge is an established paradigm (LLM-as-judge, VLM evaluators for embodied AI); the novelty delta vs nearest prior work must be assessed to determine whether the contribution claim withstands scrutiny."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is the primary goal of this review to assess technical and research rigor (logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, novelty delta), or to improve writing quality and prose clarity?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section anchors on a specific contribution claim (reference-free LLM judge beats hand-coded predicates); assessing whether the thesis, gap statement, and contribution framing are coherent and well-scoped is central to any substantive section review.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chain—predicates are brittle → GPT-4o wrapper eliminates per-task engineering → ρ results confirm superiority → advocate replacing predicates—must be checked for logical gaps, hidden assumptions, and premise-conclusion validity.
rationale.R1.3: Concrete figures (ρ = 0.78 vs 0.69 vs 0.55; 0.81 vs 0.62 on compositional families; 1,820 rollouts across 14 families) must be traceable to the described evaluation protocol; misalignment here directly invalidates the empirical core of the section.
rationale.R1.4: Using an LLM as a zero-shot reference-free judge is an established paradigm (LLM-as-judge, VLM evaluators for embodied AI); the novelty delta vs nearest prior work must be assessed to determine whether the contribution claim withstands scrutiny.

parsed.clarification_question: Is the primary goal of this review to assess technical and research rigor (logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, novelty delta), or to improve writing quality and prose clarity?
